---
title: "Sparks of Light for Everyday. Collected by Madame Guizot de Witt, done into English by the translator of ‘Gold Dust’ [E.L.E.B.]. Edited by Charlotte M. Yonge."
---

## Sparks of Light for Everyday. Collected by Madame Guizot de Witt, done into English by the translator of ‘Gold Dust’ [E.L.E.B.]. Edited by Charlotte M. Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1882
**Genre:** Edited translation
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London: J. Masters & Co., 78, New Bond Street

### Notes

E.L.E.B. is possibly CMY’s neighbour Ella L.E.Burlton.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
